name: macdc-public-info-agent
description: This repository contains an MVP that provides an AI-powered conversational interface for exploring publicly available Medicaid & CHIP performance indicator data. It ingests enrollment datasets, policy documents, and monthly snapshots from data.medicaid.gov into a PostgreSQL database and Qdrant vector store, then exposes a LangGraph-orchestrated age
longDescription: AI-powered conversational interface for exploring publicly available Medicaid & CHIP performance indicator data. Ingests enrollment datasets, policy documents, and monthly snapshots from data.medicaid.gov into PostgreSQL and Qdrant, then uses a LangGraph-orchestrated agent to answer natural language questions with SQL queries, semantic retrieval, and interactive Plotly visualizations via a Streamlit UI.
